thread_summaries.summary: Tara shared an updated purchase order (PO) with Elchemy, and Aditya confirmed the price of USD 3.57/Kg as per the blanket PO. Elchemy will proceed with the next steps and keep Tara informed on the progress.
open_items: Awaiting the updated PO with the confirmed price

thread_summaries.summary: The customer, Tara Gumann, expressed confusion regarding a delay in the delivery date of product BB, which was initially expected at the end of April but was stated to be pushed to the end of May. Elchemy's representative clarified that the previous message contained an error and confirmed that product BB will indeed be delivered by the end of April.

Elchemy confirmed the receipt of the new purchase order (PO 12P0007120) and acknowledged the requested delivery date and quantity. They requested a revision of the price to USD 3.57/Kg, as per the previously finalized blanket PO.
open_items: Await updated PO from the customer with revised pricing

thread_summaries.summary: Elchemy confirmed the completion of the contract for ISO E Super and provided details on previous purchase orders. They are awaiting communication from the customer regarding the delivery of Benzyl Benzoate and PTBCHA, which will be available by the end of April 2026, and are still waiting for updates on Lilialdehyde.
open_items: Awaiting customer's decision on PO 12P0007073 for 2600 Kg of ISO E Super.
Awaiting communication from the customer regarding the delivery of Benzyl Benzoate and PTBCHA.

thread_summaries.summary: The email thread discusses the payment for a shipment and the necessary invoices. Michele confirmed that the invoices are scheduled to be paid next week via ACH.
open_items: Confirmation of payment for the shipment by Michele
Closing the shipment in Elchemy's system after payment confirmation

thread_summaries.summary: The customer, Holly, raised a concern about an expiration date mismatch for iso e super VL: 389540 on PO 12P0006825. Elchemy acknowledged the issue and confirmed that a revised Certificate of Analysis (COA) with the correct expiration date was sent to Holly.

Elchemy is in the process of providing an updated Certificate of Insurance (COI) to Jennifer for her Trace Gains system. Aditya confirmed that the updated COI has been sent and offered further assistance if needed.
open_items: Elchemy to send the updated COI insurance form

thread_summaries.summary: Elchemy confirmed the delivery date, price, and quantity for ISO E Super as per the new PO 12P0006825. They informed that Benzyl Benzoate and PTBCHA will be available by early to mid-April, while Lilial is expected by early to mid-May.
open_items: Tara needs to confirm if she wants to revise the PO to include only ISO E Super.
Tara inquired about stock availability for other items on the contract.

thread_summaries.summary: Aditya from Elchemy provided Holly with the Certificate of Analysis (COA) as requested. He also offered further assistance if needed.

The customer, Tara, inquired about the status of an open order for ISO E SUPER TOCO SYN (BASF) with a delivery date of 2/17/2026. Elchemy's team confirmed they are checking with their Operations Team and provided a scheduled delivery date of 02/18, while also requesting delivery instructions.
open_items: Elchemy to confirm the delivery status and instructions for the order
Tara to provide any additional delivery instructions
